revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:穂積賀枯]] {{Infobox person}}
'''Hozumi no Kako''' (穂積 賀枯, dates of birth and death unknown) was a {{ill|Nobility|en|Nobility|qid=Q134737|lt=noble|1=Nobility}} during the {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|qid=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}. His {{ill|Kabane|en|Kabane|qid=Q1664099|lt=kabane|1=Kabane}} (hereditary title) was {{ill|Ason|en|Ason|qid=Q4807592|lt=Ason|1=Ason}}. His highest recorded Rank was {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}, and he served as {{ill|San'iryō|ja|散位寮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'iryō|1=Sanni Ryo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11499496}} Head. His name is also recorded as '''賀祐''' (Kō)<ref>岩波書店『続日本紀』5</ref>.
== Career == In the {{ill|Kanmu|ja|桓武|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanmu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 桓武天皇|1=Emperor Kanmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q314846}} reign during {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 2 (783), in the first month, he was promoted from {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正六位}} to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} alongside {{ill|Ōtomo no Masamaro|ja|大伴真麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Masamaro|1=Ōtomo no Mamaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q30933321}}, {{ill|Fujiwara no Otomo|ja|藤原雄友|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Otomo|1=Fujiwara no Otomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623635}}, and {{ill|Ki no Tanaga|ja|紀田長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki no Tanaga|1=Ki no Tanaga|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q106196670}}. In the second month, he was appointed {{ill|Chikara no Kami (Head of the Tax Office)|ja|主税頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikara no Kami (Head of the Tax Office)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 主税寮|1=Tax Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11368781}}, succeeding {{ill|Hioki no Michikata|ja|日置道形|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hioki no Michikata|1=heki no michikata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11510256}}<ref>『続日本紀』巻第三十七</ref>.
In Enryaku 3 (784), on the fourth day of the seventh month, he exchanged positions with {{ill|Ishikawa no Sukinamaru|ja|石川宿奈麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikawa no Sukinamaru|1=ishikawa no sukunamaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q101200119}} as Chikara no Kami. Later, he succeeded {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi Risen|ja|百済王利善|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kudara no Konikishi Risen|1=Kudara no Konikishi Rizen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q45828447}} as {{ill|San'iryō Head|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'iryō Head|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, following the latter’s death in the fifth month<ref>『続日本紀』巻第三十八</ref>. His subsequent career is unknown.
== Official Titles == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|qid=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihongi|1=Shoku Nihongi}}: * Date unknown: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正六位}} * Enryaku 2 (783) ** 1st month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} ** 2nd month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|Chikara no Kami|ja|主税頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikara no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 主税寮|1=Tax Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11368781}} * Enryaku 3 (784) ** 7th month, 4th day: Appointed {{ill|San'iryō Head|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'iryō Head|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
== Notes ==
{{Reflist}}
== References == * 『続日本紀』5 新日本古典文学大系16 {{ill|Iwanami Shoten|en|Iwanami Shoten|qid=Q1331427|lt=Iwanami Shoten|1=Iwanami Shoten}}, 1998. * {{ill|Ujitani Mō|ja|宇治谷孟|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ujitani Mō|1=Ujitani Mitsuru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11449517}}, 『続日本紀 （下）』 {{ill|Kodansha|en|Kodansha|qid=Q726081|lt=Kodansha|1=Kodansha}}〈{{ill|Kodansha Gakujutsu Bunko|ja|講談社学術文庫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodansha Gakujutsu Bunko|1=Kōdansha gakujutsu bunko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11632220}}〉, 1995. * 『日本古代氏族人名辞典』p.581, supervised by {{ill|Sakamoto Tarō|ja|坂本太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakamoto Tarō|1=Sakamoto Tarō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11425251}} and {{ill|Hirano Kunio|ja|平野邦雄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirano Kunio|1=Kunio Hirano|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11483736}}, {{ill|Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川弘文館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|1=Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4346755}}, 1990.
{{translated page|ja|穂積賀枯|version=96880217|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:穂積賀枯]]
